CheckTitle: Linode Cloud Firewall default outbound policy is DROP
Description: Linode Cloud Firewalls are checked to ensure the default outbound policy is DROP.
Risk: If the default outbound policy is not DROP, unrestricted egress traffic can increase data exfiltration and command-and-control risk.

Code.Other:
1. Log in to the Linode Cloud Manager
2. Navigate to Firewalls
3. Select the associated firewall
4. In the Rules tab, set the default outbound policy to DROP

Recommendation.Text: Set default outbound policy to DROP and allow only explicit outbound destinations and services.
